title: Molecular biology for green recovery-A call for action.
author_string: Rodríguez-Martínez, Marta, Nielsen, Jens, Dupont, Sam, Vamathevan, Jessica, Glover, Beverley J et al.
abstract: Molecular biology holds a vast potential for tackling climate change and biodiversity loss. Yet, it is largely absent from the current strategies. We call for a community-wide action to bring molecular biology to the forefront of climate change solutions.
